# `super-harness` CLI reference

Generated from the live click command tree. Every leaf command has a synopsis, param table, and exit-code list. For exit-code semantics see `cli-command-surface` Â§2.2.

---

## super-harness

super-harness â€” CI-first cross-framework + cross-agent AI coding harness.

```
super-harness [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--version`, `-V` | flag | `False` | Show the version and exit. |
| `--workspace` | directory | â€” | Project root (defaults to walk-up from cwd). |
| `--json` | flag | `False` | Machine-parseable JSON output. |
| `--quiet`, `-q` | flag | `False` |  |
| `--verbose`, `-v` | integer range | `0` |  |

## super-harness adapter

Install / uninstall / list super-harness integrations for frameworks + agents.

```
super-harness adapter COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness adapter install

Install the <name> adapter (registers hooks + persists adapters.yaml).

```
super-harness adapter install [OPTIONS] NAME
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `NAME` | text | *required* |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` installed
- `1` generic error
- `2` unknown adapter name
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness adapter list

List INSTALLED adapters (adapters.yaml entries), enriched from built-ins.

```
super-harness adapter list [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--type` | {framework\|agent} | â€” | Only list adapters of this kind. |
| `--enabled-only` | flag | `False` | Only list adapters with enabled: true. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness adapter scan-once

Run ONE synchronous observe() pass over <name>'s watch dir, emitting events.

```
super-harness adapter scan-once [OPTIONS] NAME
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `NAME` | text | *required* |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success (zero or more events emitted)
- `1` generic error (e.g. AgentAdapter passed)
- `2` precondition violation on emitted event
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness adapter uninstall

Uninstall the <name> adapter (reverse of install).

```
super-harness adapter uninstall [OPTIONS] NAME
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `NAME` | text | *required* |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` uninstalled
- `1` generic error
- `2` unknown adapter or not installed
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness anchor

Manage the @capability sentinel location index.

```
super-harness anchor COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness anchor list

Print a table of anchor_id â†’ file:line rows from the index.

```
super-harness anchor list [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--capability` | text | â€” | Restrict output to a single anchor id (also scopes --missing-sentinel). |
| `--missing-sentinel` | flag | `False` | Cross-reference declared anchors (from the active change's affected_anchors) against the index and report any that have no sentinel in the codebase. NOTE: in v0.1 affected_anchors is typically empty because no emitter populates it yet â€” this flag usually reports nothing on real data. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success (or index absent â€” friendly note)
- `1` generic error
- `3` index corrupt / unreadable

## super-harness anchor sync

Rebuild .harness/anchors/index.yaml by scanning all source files.

```
super-harness anchor sync [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness change

Declare / abandon / list lifecycle changes.

```
super-harness change COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness change abandon

Abandon an existing change by emitting `intent_abandoned`.

```
super-harness change abandon [OPTIONS] SLUG
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `SLUG` | text | *required* |  |
| `--reason` | text | `''` | Optional human-readable abandonment reason. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`
- `5` lock contention

## super-harness change list

List changes derived from events.jsonl with optional filtering.

```
super-harness change list [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--state` | {INTENT_DECLARED\|AWAITING_PLAN_REVIEW\|PLAN_REJECTED\|PLAN_APPROVED\|IMPLEMENTATION_IN_PROGRESS\|AWAITING_CODE_REVIEW\|CODE_REVIEW_REJECTED\|READY_TO_MERGE\|MERGED\|ARCHIVED\|ABANDONED} | â€” | Show only changes in this state (one of the 11 lifecycle states, uppercase). |
| `--active` | flag | `False` | Exclude ARCHIVED + ABANDONED. |
| `--archived` | flag | `False` | Show only ARCHIVED. |
| `--abandoned` | flag | `False` | Show only ABANDONED. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness change resume

Emit an agent-ready context dump for resuming a change mid-flight.

```
super-harness change resume [OPTIONS] [SLUG]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `[SLUG]` | text | â€” |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success (or no active change â€” empty output)
- `1` generic error
- `2` explicit slug unknown
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness change start

Declare a new change by emitting `intent_declared`.

```
super-harness change start [OPTIONS] SLUG
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `SLUG` | text | *required* |  |
| `--description` | text | `''` | Human-readable change description. |
| `--framework` | {openspec\|spec-kit\|superpowers\|plain} | `'plain'` | Framework label recorded on the event (v0.1: no-op placeholder; Phase 4 wires adapter selection.) |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `2` slug invalid or duplicate
- `3` no `.harness/` (run `init` first)
- `5` `state.yaml` lock contention

## super-harness daemon

Operate the workspace daemon (start / stop / status).

```
super-harness daemon COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness daemon start

Start the workspace daemon (idempotent; blocks until ready).

```
super-harness daemon start [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` running
- `1` failed to start

## super-harness daemon status

Report daemon state: running / stopped / stale-pid.

```
super-harness daemon status [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` running
- `1` stopped or stale PID

## super-harness daemon stop

Send SIGTERM; clean up socket + PID file (waits up to 2s).

```
super-harness daemon stop [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` stopped
- `1` generic error

## super-harness done

Verify a change and emit implementation_complete on a pass.

```
super-harness done [OPTIONS] [SLUG]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `[SLUG]` | text | â€” |  |
| `--skip-verify` | flag | `False` | Skip verification; emit a synthetic verification_passed then complete. |
| `--pr` | text | â€” | PR number â€” when no positional <slug> is given, resolves the slug from the PR body's super-harness metadata block. The raw --pr value is ALSO recorded on implementation_complete as pr_url. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success (verification passed â†’ `implementation_complete` emitted)
- `1` sensor crashed or timed out
- `2` verification failed or pre-flight state gate failed
- `3` no `.harness/` or missing verification config
- `4` `--pr` resolution failure

## super-harness event

Inspect the event stream.

```
super-harness event COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness event log

Print events from events.jsonl with optional filtering.

```
super-harness event log [OPTIONS] [SLUG]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `[SLUG]` | text | â€” |  |
| `--type` | text | â€” | Filter by event type. |
| `--limit` | integer | `50` | Show only the last N matching events. |
| `--tail` | flag | `False` | (v0.1: no-op placeholder; --limit already shows the trailing window.) |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness gate

Inspect the gate registry.

```
super-harness gate COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness gate check

Check a gate decision (`pre-tool-use` decides in-process).

```
super-harness gate check [OPTIONS] {pre-tool-use|pre-commit|pre-push|pr-open|pr-merge}
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `{pre-tool-use\|pre-commit\|pre-push\|pr-open\|pr-merge}` | {pre-tool-use\|pre-commit\|pre-push\|pr-open\|pr-merge} | *required* |  |
| `--tool` | text | â€” |  |
| `--file` | text | â€” |  |
| `--change-id` | text | â€” |  |
| `--pr` | integer | â€” |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` allow
- `1` generic error / unimplemented cold-path gate
- `2` deny (gate decision is `deny`)
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness gate list

List built-in + plugin gates visible to the dispatcher.

```
super-harness gate list [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error

## super-harness init

Initialize a project for super-harness.

```
super-harness init [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--setup-github` | flag | `False` | Run gh CLI checks, write .github/pull_request_template.md and .github/workflows/super-harness.yml, and best-effort enable repo auto-merge/squash settings (requires gh). |
| `--framework` | {openspec\|spec-kit\|superpowers\|plain} | â€” | Explicit framework; default = auto-detect (v0.1: no-op placeholder; Phase 4 wires adapter selection.) |
| `--force` | flag | `False` |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` already initialized (no `--force`)
- `4` `gh` CLI missing (with `--setup-github`)
- `5` concurrent init lock contention

## super-harness on-merge

Emit a ``merged`` event and dispatch L1-updater + anchor-index-rebuilder.

```
super-harness on-merge [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--commit` | text | *required* | Merge commit SHA (opaque; CI passes ${{ github.sha }}). |
| `--change` | text | â€” | Slug override (CI passes ${{ github.head_ref }} = branch = slug). |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `2` validation error (bad commit SHA / slug)
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness pr

PR-side helpers (validate PR metadata + lifecycle).

```
super-harness pr COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness pr emit-opened

Emit a ``pr_opened`` event and dispatch PR-decorator to inject metadata.

```
super-harness pr emit-opened [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--pr` | integer | *required* | PR number (CI passes ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}). |
| `--change` | text | *required* | Slug (CI passes ${{ github.head_ref }} = branch = slug, VISION convention). |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness pr validate

Validate a PR's metadata block + the change's lifecycle (read-only verdict).

```
super-harness pr validate [OPTIONS] PR_NUMBER
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `PR_NUMBER` | integer | *required* |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` valid
- `1` generic error
- `2` invalid metadata or lifecycle violation
- `3` no `.harness/`
- `4` `gh` CLI failure

## super-harness sensor

Inspect the sensor registry.

```
super-harness sensor COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness sensor list

List built-in + plugin sensors visible to the dispatcher.

```
super-harness sensor list [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error

## super-harness state

Inspect / rebuild the derived state.yaml.

```
super-harness state COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness state rebuild

Re-derive state.yaml from events.jsonl.

```
super-harness state rebuild [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | flag | `False` | Print derived state to stdout instead of writing. |
| `--verify` | flag | `False` | (v0.1: no-op placeholder; chain `state verify` separately for now.) |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness state verify

Validate events.jsonl invariants and reducer determinism.

```
super-harness state verify [OPTIONS]
```

**Exit codes:**

- `0` clean
- `1` generic error
- `2` invariant violation
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness status

Show current state for one change, all changes, or the first active change.

```
super-harness status [OPTIONS] [SLUG]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `[SLUG]` | text | â€” |  |
| `--all` | flag | `False` | Show every change, including ARCHIVED + ABANDONED. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness sync

Re-render the AGENTS.md super-harness section without re-running init.

```
super-harness sync [OPTIONS]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--agents-md` | flag | `False` | Re-render the AGENTS.md super-harness section (version bump + re-inject installed adapters). v0.1: identical to no-arg â€” built-in adapters contribute no verification.yaml checks yet, so the adapter-checks sync leg is a no-op (v0.2 adds it). |
| `--adapter` | text | â€” | Re-inject ONLY this adapter's subsection (no outer version bump). Wins over --agents-md if both are given. |
| `--yes`, `-y` | flag | `False` | Skip the overwrite-confirm prompt. |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` success
- `1` generic error
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness verification

Register / manage verification checks in `.harness/verification.yaml`.

```
super-harness verification COMMAND [ARGS...]
```

## super-harness verification register

Register <yaml-file>'s checks into adapter_provided under <adapter-name>.

```
super-harness verification register [OPTIONS] ADAPTER_NAME YAML_FILE
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `ADAPTER_NAME` | text | *required* |  |
| `YAML_FILE` | file | *required* |  |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` registered
- `1` generic error
- `2` validation error / id conflict
- `3` no `.harness/`

## super-harness verify

Run verification checks for a change and report the verdict.

```
super-harness verify [OPTIONS] [SLUG]
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `[SLUG]` | text | â€” |  |
| `--pr` | text | â€” | PR number â€” when no positional <slug> is given, resolves the slug from the PR body's super-harness metadata block. |
| `--layer` | {baseline\|adapter\|user} | â€” | Restrict the run to a single verification layer. |
| `--check` | text (repeatable) | â€” | Run only checks with this id (repeatable). |

**Exit codes:**

- `0` verdict pass
- `1` sensor crashed or timed out
- `2` verdict fail / config validation error / `--pr` malformed metadata
- `3` `.harness/verification.yaml` missing
- `4` `--pr` resolution failure (gh fetch / no block / missing Change field)
